data.Name: SeismicLineGeometry-IndexPropertyPathConfiguration-<timestamp>
data.Description: The index property list for linegeometry<timestamp>:1., valid for all linegeometry kinds for major version 1.

Configurations.Name: Extent
Configurations.UseCase: As a user I want to know the extent of a geodetic shape and use it to search data.

Configurations.Name: Length
Configurations.UseCase: As a user I want to find length of the geometry lines in meter.
